author: veritas1
description: Turn your notes into text-to-speech audio files with Eleven Labs.

manifest.author: Mark Charles
manifest.description: Turn your Obsidian notes into text-to-speech audio files with Eleven Labs.
manifest.name: Eleven Labs

name: Eleven Labs

releases.author: veritas1
releases.description:
### New Features:
- Open the eleven labs modal using the Command Palette (`CTRL` + `p`)
- Select which model to use when generating audio:
   - Multilingual v2
   - Multilingual v1
   - English v1
   - Turbo v1

releases.author: veritas1
releases.description:
Fix:

- Use `requestUrl` from obsidian core instead of axios.
- Sentence casing in UI.
- css polluting core styling.
- event listener unloading.
- empty content api.

releases.author: veritas1
releases.description:
- Connect Eleven Labs account
- Load cloned, generated and pre-made voices
- Override voice settings
- Generate text-to-speech audio files
